name: Root Insurance Telematics Auto Insurance API
what_it_does: Root Insurance mobile telematics-based auto insurance REST API for usage-based insurance (UBI) quoting, policy management, and embedded insurance programs based on driving behavior scoring. Enables AI agents to manage mobile telematics data collection and driving score calculation for behavior-based auto insurance quoting automation, handle test drive period management and insurance eligibility determination for telematics underwriting automation, access real-time quote generation and premium calculation for embedded insurance binding automation, retrieve policy management and coverage change for digital auto insurance lifecycle automation, manage claims intake and FNOI for digital claims automation, handle driver scoring and risk factor attribution for telematics-based pricing transparency automation, access embedded insurance partner program for automotive finance and dealer F&I integration, retrieve renewal pricing and driving score update for telematics policy lifecycle automation, manage multi-driver household enrollment for family telematics program automation, and integrate Root with automotive OEMs, fleet platforms, and digital insurance aggregators for embedded telematics insurance.
use_cases: Quoting UBI insurance from telematics scoring agents
Managing test drives from onboarding automation agents
Binding auto policies from embedded insurance agents
Filing auto claims from digital FNOI automation agents
best_when: An automotive dealer, auto finance platform, car-sharing company, or financial services company wanting AI agents to automate usage-based auto insurance quoting, telematics score integration, and embedded insurance binding for price-conscious or good driver consumers via Root's behavior-based pricing model.
avoid_when: STATE AVAILABILITY FOR UBI AUTO INSURANCE: Root telematics auto insurance is not available in all US states; automated quote initiation must check Root state availability before starting test drive workflow; automated binding in states where Root is not licensed or admitted creates insurance regulatory violation. TELEMATICS DATA BIAS AND FAIR LENDING COMPLIANCE: Root driving score algorithm has been subject to regulatory scrutiny in some states for potential proxy discrimination; automated underwriting using Root telematics data must monitor for disparate impact on protected class characteristics; Colorado and other states have enacted AI underwriting fairness requirements. FINANCIAL STABILITY CONTEXT FOR EMBEDDED PROGRAMS: Root Insurance has experienced financial challenges as a public company; validate Root carrier stability and reinsurance arrangements before building embedded insurance programs with long-term customer commitments.

auth.notes: Root Insurance uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Columbus, Ohio HQ. Founded 2015 by Alex Timm and Dan Manges. Public (NASDAQ: ROOT via IPO 2020). Mobile telematics-based auto insurance using smartphone driving behavior scoring. Coverage in 30+ US states. Embedded insurance program for automotive dealers (Root for Business). OEM partnership (Carvana, Edmunds). Competes with Metromile (Lemonade acquisition), Clearcover, and traditional UBI programs (Progressive Snapshot, State Farm Drive Safe) for telematics auto insurance.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — carrier partnership and revenue share for embedded programs; direct consumer pricing via Root app
pricing.paid_tiers: Direct consumer: behavior-based premium pricing via Root app; Embedded partner: revenue share model; API access via Root for Business partner program
pricing.notes: Columbus OH. NASDAQ: ROOT. Founded 2015. 30+ state coverage. Behavior-based pricing via telematics. Embedded program (Root for Business) for dealers and automotive partners.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; quote and policy queries throttled; webhooks for test drive and policy events

known_agent_gotchas: STATE AVAILABILITY CHECK BEFORE TEST DRIVE INITIATION: Root Insurance is not available in all 50 states; automated quote workflow must check Root state availability by driver ZIP code before initiating test drive period; state availability changes with Root regulatory filing status

TEST DRIVE PERIOD TELEMATICS DATA QUALITY: Root underwriting is based on test drive telematics data quality; automated test drive enrollment must ensure smartphone app telematics permissions are properly granted; incomplete telematics data collection during test drive period results in quote unavailability or maximum risk pricing

DISPARATE IMPACT MONITORING FOR TELEMATICS SCORING: Root telematics driving score algorithm has been subject to state regulatory scrutiny for potential proxy discrimination; automated Root insurance recommendation must monitor for disparate impact across protected classes; Colorado SB21-169 and other state AI insurance laws require disparate impact testing for algorithmic underwriting

PUBLIC COMPANY FINANCIAL STABILITY MONITORING: Root Insurance is a public company (NASDAQ: ROOT) with reported financial challenges; embedded insurance program partners should monitor Root carrier financial stability ratings and reinsurance arrangements; carrier insolvency creates policyholder and embedded partner program disruption

TELEMATICS SDK MOBILE PLATFORM DEPENDENCY: Root telematics data collection requires Root iOS or Android SDK integration; automated test drive workflow for non-native mobile contexts (web, kiosk) requires SDK integration planning; web-based quote without mobile SDK creates test drive period data gap

MULTI-DRIVER HOUSEHOLD SCORING COMPLEXITY: Root household policy with multiple drivers requires telematics data for each driver; automated multi-driver enrollment must collect telematics consent and data for all listed drivers; household policy pricing based on incomplete driver telematics data creates underwriting accuracy issue
agent_readiness.security_notes: Telematics auto insurance. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Driver behavior data, telematics scores, and policyholder PII.

security_score_components.security_notes: Telematics auto insurance. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Driver behavior, telematics, and policyholder data.
